parsed_review.summary: CP00-793 is a descriptor-only RP26 Enterprise SaaS Hardening "service workflow tail" pack (risk A, 10 units, RP26.P02.M04.S11-RP26.P02.M04.S20); its pack-level claim is descriptor-level verification only (production_ready_flag=enterprise_saas_service_workflow_tail_descriptor_verified) and it does NOT claim runtime production readiness or enterprise trust (runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor). Baseline integrity verified: pack_id/risk/unit_count/range/program_id match across manifest.json, review-baseline.json, registry binding (registry.js:137 ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP793_PACK_BINDING), contract latest_pack/latest_projection (contracts/enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.json:71,9589,9591), live plan (closeout-pack-plan.json:36 live_state CP00-793, next RP26.P02.M04.S21), and next-pack-queue.json (live_latest_pack_id CP00-793, live_next_unit_id RP26.P02.M04.S21, next CP00-794). Deliverable distribution (ui2/implementation3/claude_review1/failure_recovery2/test2=10) and micro-title split (Secondary Workflow Slice x10) match ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP793_REQUIREMENTS and a manual count of the 10 manifest units (S11 Lock acquisition rule/ui, S12 Persistence boundary/impl, S13 Validation error mapping/impl, S14 Review-required routing/claude_review, S15 Approval-required routing/ui, S16 Blocked-claim output/impl, S17 Rollback behavior/failure_recovery, S18 Retry behavior/failure_recovery, S19 Unit test happy path/test, S20 Unit test denied path/test). Implementation (service.js:463 createEnterpriseSaasCp793ServiceWorkflowTailDescriptor) extends the CP792 source descriptor following the established pattern, using SERVICE_ROWS.slice(10,20) for RP26.P02.M04, unique row keys, per-row runtime-closed flags in ROW_EXTRAS (lock_acquisition_rule.acquires_runtime_lock=false, persistence_boundary.creates/updates_database_rows/writes_object_storage=false, rollback_behavior.writes_product_state=false, retry_behavior.persists_workflow_attempt=false, unit_test_*_path.executes_unit_test_runtime_paths=false), and the comprehensive frozen ENTERPRISE_SAAS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION applied to every result via freezeResult. validators.js enforces descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no tenant/identity/directory/secret payloads, no cross-tenant route, no key/secret material, no permission-decision detail, no audit-event body, no real tenant data, no enterprise-trust claim, plus SSO/SCIM descriptor validation and Hermes/Claude gate and handoff drift checks. Tests: npm test reports tests 3064 / pass 3064 / fail 0 (exit 0), including CP793-specific assertions that the descriptor stays runtime-closed (no acquires_runtime_lock/creates_database_rows, no permission_decision_detail/audit_event_body), Claude read-only and non-final, handoff to CP00-794, and contract promotion of CP00-793 with prior packs historical. Validation: all 13 command-evidence commands exit 0 (closeout-pack-plan, closeout-pack node --check, closeout-pack:validate, test, validate, spec:requirements, weighted, fullplan, goal:closeout, rp00:control-plane, critical-rps, rp26, rp26:enterprise-saas) plus git diff --check exit 0; contract validation marker valid:true/errors:[] (contract line 11865). No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, production_ready_descriptor_verified=false (expected pre-review state awaiting this receipt), no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false. Authority boundary preserved: Claude is read_only independent reviewer and not final approver (authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, claude_packet.promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, read_only=true), human final approval required for runtime opening; Hermes control-plane patterns are confined to descriptor-only review packet/receipt handling (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, receipt_shape descriptor_only_enterprise_saas_no_write) and are not embedded in product runtime. blocks_goal_closeout=false: the pack does not claim runtime or enterprise trust, so the human/enterprise-trust authority boundary is outside this CP closeout receipt. CP178+ review hardening: auth preflight passed (readiness-report exit 0, 1228-byte valid JSON result), and no prior review attempt is passed off as valid evidence (claude-review-result valid_review_receipts and invalid_review_attempts both empty; the pending 0-byte raw-output is this in-flight review's placeholder, status=pending). The control-room files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html) and other untracked workbook/docx files are explicitly listed as unrelated_dirty_files_preserved in changed-file-scope.json and the manifest worktree_transition_policy and are correctly not treated as pack scope. README cp00-793 entry present. No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects found; nothing blocks this CP's closeout goal.
